title: Kingdom Communication
content: Strong kingdoms coordinate attacks, intel, assignments, and timing through clear communication between members.

title: Attack Timing
content: Attack timing is critical during wars. Coordinated attacks reduce enemy recovery options and maximize kingdom impact.

title: Target Calling
content: Target calling assigns specific enemy provinces for kingdom members to attack based on strategic goals.

title: Wave Preparation
content: Before a wave, attackers should confirm targets, gather intel, prepare armies, and coordinate attack times.

title: Follow Up Attacks
content: Follow up attacks continue pressure on enemy provinces after the initial wave.

title: Province Roles
content: Provinces have different battlefield roles including attackers, hybrids, thieves, and mages.

title: Attacker Role
content: Attackers focus on military strength and gaining land through offensive actions.

title: Mage Role
content: Mages use spells to support allies and weaken enemies through magical actions.

title: Thief Role
content: Thieves provide intelligence and sabotage enemy provinces before and during wars.

title: Hybrid Role
content: Hybrid provinces combine multiple abilities such as attacking with magic or thievery support.

title: Economic Role
content: Economic strength supports military production, recovery, and long-term war performance.

title: Building Strategy
content: Buildings determine province performance and should match the intended role and strategy.

title: Military Strategy
content: Military composition should balance offense, defense, losses, and province goals.

title: Defense Strategy
content: Defense protects provinces from enemy attacks and helps reduce losses during wars.

title: Offense Strategy
content: Offense determines attack capability and land gaining potential.

title: Intel Updates
content: Updated intel is required because provinces change after attacks, spells, and operations.
